items.title: Amasty issues massive security release for 25 Magento extensions, one critical RCE
items.summary: Amasty released a security update for 25 Magento extensions, with one critical vulnerability that could lead to remote code execution. Sansec Shield already blocks the critical issues.

items.title: Unauthenticated file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, opening the door to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento (Unauthenticated PHP object injection)
items.summary: Sansec discovered an unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, rated 9.8 (critical), which can lead to remote code execution via a crafted CacheWarmer cookie. Mirasvit released a patched version (1.11.12) on May 25, 2026, and CISA has added this flaw to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: Adobe released a security update resolving critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source. Successful exploitation could lead to security feature bypass, application denial-of-service, privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and arbitrary file system read.

items.title: Stored XSS via Server-Side Template Injection leading to Admin Takeover
items.summary: This critical vulnerability, part of APSB25-50, affects Adobe Commerce versions and allows for stored cross-site scripting via server-side template injection, which can lead to an admin takeover. Adobe has released an isolated patch for this issue.

items.title: Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution in Magento & Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Named 'SessionReaper' by Sansec, this critical bug allows customer account takeover and unauthenticated remote code execution under certain conditions. Automated attacks have hit over 50% of all stores globally.

items.title: Arbitrary Code Execution, Security Feature Bypass, and Privilege Escalation
items.summary: This critical vulnerability, addressed in APSB24-40, affects Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source, allowing arbitrary code execution, security feature bypass, and privilege escalation. Adobe is aware that this CVE has been exploited in the wild in limited attacks.
